Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 2.0 cm x 3.8 cm x 0.0 cm.
  Wound bed: 69% slough, 31% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — not improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
